title: ACCUWEIGH 203 Stainless Steel Digital Kitchen Scale with Tare Function, LCD Display and Multiple Measurement Units, 5Kg Capacity Food Weighing Scale, White
features: Accurate measurement: This high accuracy kitchen scale, built with high precision sensors, provides fast and accurate responses and is a must for the home and kitchen as it weighs food for your daily life

Easy to tare: This digital baking scale displays results in ounces, grams, pounds, fluid ounces in millilitres, can weigh up to 5 kg of food, in 3 g increments. The tare button subtracts container weight to zero so you can measure the exact quantity that you need
Energy saving: The food scale includes energy-saving auto shut-off function, low battery and overload indication and is powered by one CR2032 battery
Easy to store: The kitchen scale has a stylish and pleasing design and a hygienic and easy to clean stainless steel platform with a large LCD display
Accuweight Multifunctional electronic kitchen scale, your reliable choice: Ideal for baking, cooking, weighing mail and preparing coffee; fantastic for helping to control portions and lose weight
description: Product Description The ACCUWEIGHT digital kitchen scale makes it easy to quickly weigh ingredients or food items up to 5000g. It's particularly handy for all your everyday cooking, baking and food preparation needs. The tare function makes it easy to zero out the weight after measuring each ingredient and you will have an accurate weight for subsequent ingredients. Large Weighting Platform The kitchen scale is equipped with large platform, yet has a stainless steel surface which can precisely measure solid foods and liquids with ease and convenience. Tare Function Add and weigh multiple ingredients in one bowl for super quick food prep. The tare feature is a handy function for the health conscious, bakers and cooks. Taring will help you accurately measure portion sizes and ingredients, without all the math. Easy to Clean The stainless steel surface makes it easy to clean as needed--wiping it down with a soft, slightly damp cloth. When not in use, it can be conveniently tucked away in a pantry or cupboard. Precise Weight Built-in high-precision sensor, the accurate food scale weighs up to 5kg with the accuracy of1g. And the minimum weight recommendation is 3g Multiple Units Effectively measure in g, lb:oz, ml and fl:oz. Easy to weight the fruits, vegetables, meats, water, milk and other liquids. Low Power Indicator Low battery indicator make the food weighting scale easy to use. Always know when to replace the batteries to keep your measurements easy and accurate. Auto-off Function The scale will turn off automatically in 180s if there is no change in weight, or in 60s when the weight is removed.
